{{Quote|The Rebel Four hesitate for nothing! When but a handful of stormtroopers stand between us and victory, all I have to say is… It's Rebellin' time!|F4-MF, to the Rebel Four|<ref name="Rebel Four" />}}
'''Falaem Onn''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] team called the [[Rebel Four]]. By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Onn and the team went on a [[Mission to Vatleria|mission]] to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vatleria]] and confirmed the presence of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stone ruins|base]] there. The team attacked the base's [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], with Onn flying in on a [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]]. However, they were defeated by traps activated by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], which resulted in Onn being [[Fire/Legends|burned]] to [[Death/Legends|death]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Sigh. These pathetic Rebels are no match for the power of the dark side.|Darth Vader, after vanquishing the Rebel Four|<ref name="Rebel Four" />}}
[[File:HumanTorch.png|thumb|right|250px|Falaem Onn's fate]]
Falaem Onn was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] who served in the [[Rebel Four]], an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] team led by the [[IG-series/Legends|IG-series]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[F4-MF]] that also included [[Soo Rcharrz]] and [[Grimgrim]].<ref name="Rebel Four" /> By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the Alliance and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the team [[Mission to Vatleria|traveled]] to the [[stone ruins]] on the<ref name="Rebel Four" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for the [[Vatleria system/Legends|Vatleria system]].</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vatleria]] after an [[Unidentified informant|informant]] reported to them that the Empire was establishing a base there. On Vatleria, F4-MF confirmed the presence of Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and united the team into a huddle.<ref name="Rebel Four" />

The droid declared that nothing would stop the Rebel Four and led the team to charge in, loudly announcing that it was "Rebellin' time." Onn flew into the base with a [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]] and fired on the stormtroopers with a pair of [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]]. Within the base, the attack was observed by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who activated [[Rope/Legends|ropes]] that pulled the Rebel Four into [[Death/Legends|death]] chambers that killed each of them gruesomely. Onn's fate was to be [[Fire/Legends|burned]] to death. Vader afterward expressed disappointment at how easily the team had been defeated.<ref name="Rebel Four" />

==Personality and traits==
Onn was a brave freedom fighter and willingly followed F4-MF's lead into battle. The bald Rebel had [[Color/Legends|red]] skin and yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Rebel Four" />

==Equipment==
Onn wore a gloveless [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot's]] [[Flight suit/Legends|flight suit]] with brown [[Boot/Legends|boots]]. In combat, the humanoid used a jetpack and a pair of [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] pistols.<ref name="Rebel Four" />

==Behind the scenes==
Falaem Onn appeared in the [[Canon|non-canon]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic story]] "[[The Rebel Four]],"  written and illustrated by [[Jay Stephens]] and published in the [[Star Wars Tales 9|ninth issue]] of the anthology series ''[[Star Wars Tales]]''<ref name="Rebel Four" /> by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[October 10]], [[2001]].<ref name="Dark Horse">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/00-458/Star-Wars-Tales-9-photo-cover|text=Star Wars Tales 9}}</ref> The character's name<ref name="Rebel Four" /> resembles the catchphrase "Flame on," used by the [[Wikipedia:Fantastic Four|Fantastic Four]] superhero [[Wikipedia:Human Torch|Human Torch]].<ref name="Human Torch">{{Marvel|url=characters/human-torch-johnny-storm/in-comics/profile|text=Human Torch (Jonathan Lowell Spencer "Johnny" Storm)}}</ref> Onn's fate of being burned to death<ref name="Rebel Four" /> additionally bears similarity to the Human Torch's fire-based powers.<ref name="Human Torch" />
